Name: HandIKParam
Description: Determines the handling for hand inverse kinematics.

Fields.Name: Start Interpolation Time
Fields.Description: The start interpolation time for hand IK. In seconds.

Fields.Name: End Interpolation Time
Fields.Description: The end interpolation time for hand IK. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Position Offset: X
Fields.Description: The position offset to apply on the x-axis during hand IK.

Fields.Name: Position Offset: Y
Fields.Description: The position offset to apply on the y-axis during hand IK.

Fields.Name: Position Offset: Z
Fields.Description: The position offset to apply on the z-axis during hand IK.

Fields.Name: Rotation Offset: X
Fields.Description: The rotation offset to apply on the x-axis during hand IK.

Fields.Name: Rotation Offset: Y
Fields.Description: The rotation offset to apply on the y-axis during hand IK.

Fields.Name: Rotation Offset: Z
Fields.Description: The rotation offset to apply on the z-axis during hand IK.
